case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ELISA P. SANTIAGO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 B(1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
